title: トゥインクル・ドリーム

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day after training with Maruzensky, another racer timidly
approaches us.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh... Um, excuse me! H-h-hi, Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hello! Heheh, don't be so nervous. You're Special Week, right? The
new transfer student?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! Um, um, your running is really great! You run like you've got
plenty of energy to spare, but you're so fast... I really want to run just
like you do!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Made me think that if I want to be the top racer in all of Japan, I
need to be that fast too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The top of Japan? My dear, is that your dream?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, yes! It is!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I really want Mom and Mama to see me become the greatest racer in
all of Japan. That's why I left Hokkaido to come here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's great. I think it's a wonderful dream. I hope you make it
someday! I'll be cheering for you, Spe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! Um, i-if it's all right... Could we run together
sometime?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'd love to run with you! Please, it'd mean so much!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: With me? Uh, let's see...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let me go check my schedule! I'll let you know ASAP. Sound good?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh wow, of course! Okay, see you later!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Catch you on the flip side. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Like me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, Maruzensky seems to be lost in the occasional thought during
our training talk.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I lost focus. I've been thinking circles about what Spe said.
choice_data_list: She asked to run with you, right?
She asked to run with you, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I mean, I wouldn't mind at all, you know? How could I not help
out a cute little trainee?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: But, you know... Spe has this crystal clear dream of hers.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I can't imagine I'd be any help to a bright-eyed kid like that...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, sorry! It's so strange—I always seem to get like this when I'm
with you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, sorry! It's so strange—I always seem to get like this when I'm
with you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She has faith in me, and as a role model, I can't let her down! Would
it be okay to go for that run with Spe?
choice_data_list: Sure, we can tell her together.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
She has faith in me, and as a role model, I can't let her down! Would
it be okay to go for that run with Spe?
choice_data_list: Sure, we can tell her together.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks. ♪ Then let's go find her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sounds happy about it, but I see some hesitancy in her step. She
must still be unsure if she can live up to younger racers' aspirations.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But she needn't worry, because the part of her Special Week and the
others draw aspiration from is...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer? What's the hold up? Let's get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer? What's the hold up? Let's get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Getting to the point, we're on for a pair run! How's this evening
sound?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's great! Thank you! I can't believe I get to run with the
amazing Maruzen... I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now, now... You don't have to be so serious, home skillet. It's just me
after all.
choice_data_list: What about Maruzen do you like the most?
What about Maruzen do you like the most?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Uh, Trainer? What are you asking...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Uh, Trainer? What are you asking...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You mean what do I admire most about her? Well, obviously she's a
really strong racer and all that...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But the biggest thing is... no matter the race, she always looks like
she's having fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You know how racers in the Twinkle Series inspire runners
everywhere?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I too came here to make my mom proud and give people hope... And
I think Maruzen does that better than anyone.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She's strong, fast, and loves racing. It's amazing to watch, and so
exciting!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, oh no! It's my turn to clean the classroom today! Sorry, gotta go! I
won't be late for our run though!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, s-sure. See you later.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer... you're really something.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Trainer... you're really something.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, playing dumb, huh? Hmph, fine... Geez, I can't believe you
though.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, playing dumb, huh? Hmph, fine... Geez, I can't believe you
though.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: She said I give her hope and that my joy for running inspires her...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll look totally uncool if I back out after that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky seems to be in a great mood as she and Special Week run
together.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant... Wow, you really are amazing... I can't catch up at all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Watch carefully, Spe. I'm about to put the pedal to the metal.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We're just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky shows the younger racer an impressive run before
returning.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm back, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm back, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, I didn't even break a sweat. I'm still ready for more. ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I can't stand around dawdling if I'm going to inspire the younger
generation!
